style_effects: Subtle heat haze shimmers around Butterfree's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, accompanied by metallic dust particles drifting in slow, precise arcs. The aura emits a cool cyan radiance with sharp, geometric intensity, casting long, clean shadows under a pale moonlight glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
